description_long: This nightstand is crafted from dark, polished wood with a rich, reddish-brown finish and subtle wood grain patterns visible across all surfaces. The front features two drawers, each adorned with elegant, curved brass handles that add a touch of classic sophistication. The legs are straight and slightly tapered, with a decorative molding detail at the top, giving the piece a refined, traditional look. The sides and back are plain, with the wood grain running horizontally, and there are no visible decorative carvings or inlays. The top surface is flat and spacious, suitable for supporting lamps, books, or other small items. The overall construction appears sturdy and well-crafted, making it suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A dark, polished wooden nightstand with two brass-handled drawers and tapered legs, featuring a classic, traditional design. The top is flat and spacious, with subtle wood grain and no decorative carvings.
description_view_0: Front view showing two drawers with curved brass handles and detailed leg moldings.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain wood grain side panel and the profile of the tapered legs.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain, uninterrupted wood grain panel and no visible hardware.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the plain side and leg structure.
attribute_leg_design: straight, slightly tapered wooden legs with decorative molding
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: beside a bed or against a wall
